seller_info_text: Dispatched from and sold by ChironMediaLtd.
description: What is human intelligence? What sets humans apart from computers? After all, many computers can process answers at a remarkable rate. Can you? Tricky Riddles for Smart Kids is a book that creates challenges to expand this intelligence to a new level. This book takes the reader on a journey to learn about four Smart Kids from around the globe. In these stories, we follow Alex, Ilene, Zachary, and Jonelle as they tell us about where they are from and their favorite subjects. Grab a copy of the book to discover all about: Different ways to solve brain teasers Wordplay with many hidden meanings Math puzzles that can drive you mad Funny rhymes that will blow your mind! And so much more! Wide varieties of riddles exist, and as the readers immerse themselves in the lives of Alex, Ilene, Zachary, and Jonelle, they will begin to see patterns emerge. Tricky Riddles for Smart Kids is designed for family and friends to work together as it may take multiple minds to solve some of these more challenging riddles. The most incredible thing about a riddle is that the answer can often be right in front of you, calling you to piece it together. Are you ready to start? Read more
